fix_plan.description:
1. Obtain fresh SHA256 hashes — source from ani-cli (pystardust/ani-cli on GitHub, search for 'persistedQuery sha256Hash' in the allanime script) or browser DevTools network capture on allanime.day. You need three values: ALLANIME_QUERY_SEARCH_SHA, ALLANIME_QUERY_EPISODES_SHA, ALLANIME_QUERY_SOURCES_SHA.
2. Update docker/.env with the three new SHA values.
3. Run: make restart-catalog (env-var change only — no code rebuild needed, the catalog binary reads SHAs from env at startup).
fix_plan.context: The allanime parser in services/catalog/internal/parser/allanime/queries.go is explicitly designed for this scenario — SHAs are read from ALLANIME_QUERY_*_SHA env vars (config.go:171-174) so they can be rotated without a code change. The fallback constants in queries.go are now stale. This is NOT a code bug; it is an operational rotation.
fix_plan.verification: After restart, run: curl -s http://localhost:8081/metrics | grep 'parser_requests_total.*allanime'. The error counter should stop incrementing. To confirm a live round-trip: trigger a raw stream request for any anime. Watch catalog logs for absence of 'query rejected (likely stale SHA)' errors.
